step_by_step_reasoning: We identify two main ingestion pipelines matching the physical structure of the board. The top ingestion pipeline takes locomotive sensor data (Producer) through a Lambda, Kinesis, and Kinesis Analytics chain to filter and downsample. The second, hand-drawn track sensor pipeline is cloned using IaC and merges into a central, normalized Kinesis stream. A secondary Lambda handles writing this consolidated data to DynamoDB, as well as serving read queries requested through an API Gateway to the downstream consumer algorithm.

graph.name: Swiss Federal Railway SBB Freight Train Digital Twin Architecture
graph.notes: Serverless ingestion and processing pipeline designed using infrastructure-as-code (IaC) templates for easily cloning additional ingestion sources (e.g., track-side sensors) and consolidating them into a unified digital twin state store.

nodes.name: Locomotive Producer
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Generates approximately 3 million samples daily per locomotive.

nodes.name: Ingestion Lambda
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Converts source-specific locomotive message structures into a standard payload format.

nodes.name: Raw Ingest Stream
nodes.notes: Buffer for incoming high-volume telemetry data.

nodes.name: Telemetry Filter
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Filters noise and reduces data volume to only the essential metrics needed for digital twin.

nodes.name: Track Sensors Producer
nodes.notes: Represents the alternate hand-drawn sensor pipeline on the track.

nodes.name: Normalized Stream
nodes.notes: Consolidated stream collecting processed telemetry from all sensors.

nodes.name: State Handler Lambda
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Dual-purpose function managing read/write operations to DynamoDB.

nodes.name: Digital Twin Database
nodes.notes: Stores current state of freight trains and physical components.

nodes.name: Query API
nodes.notes: Provides access endpoint for internal processing algorithms.

nodes.name: Analysis Consumer
nodes.notes: Runs decision logic to evaluate train safety and parts condition.

edges.notes: Sends filtered events to normalized queue
Pushes secondary cloned track pipeline output
